<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
  <title>Falling Pills</title>
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="./style.css" />
</head>
<body>
  <main class="stage" aria-label="Animated falling pills">

      <defs>

          <stop stop-color="#53B8DD" />
          <stop offset="1" stop-color="#46A3EF" />
        </linearGradient>
        <linearGradient id="paint1_linear_1040_3384" x1="479.5" y1="314.5" x2="588.5" y2="223" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
          <stop stop-color="#9B9CF6" />
          <stop offset="1" stop-color="#5C9BF9" />
        </linearGradient>

        <linearGradient id="paint4_linear_1040_3384" x1="537.502" y1="520.926" x2="584.5" y2="632" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
          <stop stop-color="#A999F9" />

        <linearGradient id="paint5_linear_1040_3384" x1="521.738" y1="447.371" x2="688.464" y2="447.371" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
          <stop stop-color="#9E9CF6" />

      </defs>
    </svg>
  </main>
</body>
</html>
